headline: Assessing PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance and context for PayPal Holdings (PYPL) PayPal Holdings (PYPL) has drawn investor attention after a stretch of weaker share performance, with the stock down 11% over the past month and 12% over the past 3 months. Over longer periods, the share price has also declined. This includes a 43% drop over the past year and a 35% total return decline over 3 years, which frames today’s valuation debate.
